claim: load_registry ignores the additive cloud_mappings section (schema_version stays 1, recorder unaffected) — the recorder's registry loader must not fail, re-version, or mis-parse when the new top-level cloud_mappings key is present.
cloud_mappings.agent_jobs entries use keys workflow_file/job/agent_step/consumer/routed_command (+optional consumer_approximate); the census analyzer must consume these exact key names.
devflow-review.yml agent job reports to the jobs-API as nested name 'review / run' (review job calls reusable devflow-runner.yml whose agent job is 'run').
devflow-implement.yml contains an agent job named 'claude' running claude-code-action.
devflow.yml contains an agent job named 'command' running claude-code-action, multiplexing /devflow:review, /devflow:review-and-fix, /devflow:pr-description.
agent_step value 'claude-code-action' names the actual step running the agent in each of the three listed workflows.

matcher-probe.yml is the ONLY claude-code-action workflow excluded on purpose — every claude-code-action-running workflow under .github/workflows/ is either enumerated in agent_jobs or is matcher-probe.yml.
devflow-runner.yml is workflow_call-only and never appears as its own workflow run.
matcher-probe.yml runs claude-code-action specifically in its probe / implement-probe / schedulewakeup-probe / execfile-shape-probe / hook-probe jobs.
Review entry's user_commands contains both /devflow:review and /review first-message forms (issue #527 AC6).
The new 'review' entry's required surface glob skills/review/SKILL.md resolves to a real file.
